cases.title: TS-20: Mobile web check-in via preflight pass then POST /check-in marks Present within 2 s
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Enrolled Student authenticated with valid session cookie (mobile web client context)
Valid unexpired QrToken extracted from qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Student coordinates within radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
Student attendance status is Pending for session
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 with outcome Valid and session summary
Record wall-clock start time before POST /api/v1/check-in
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from scanned QR payload, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200, spoofMetadata.platform android using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response outcome Success and message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response attendance.status Present and checkedInAt is ISO 8601 UTC timestamp
Assert elapsed wall-clock time from request start to response ≤ 2000 ms under normal network
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert student status Present
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status Consumed
cases.expected: FR-07 satisfied: preflight passes per BR-15; authenticated student submits token from QR scan; attendance Present; confirmation within 2 s per NFR-04; no native app required

cases.title: TS-21: Non-enrolled student preflight returns NotEnrolled before GPS or Present record
preconditions: Active session for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 exists
Authenticated Student B exists but is not enrolled in session class-subject pair
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current qrPayload
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert Vietnamese message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
Query attendance_records for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
Verify no POST /check-in invoked by client flow after preflight failure
cases.expected: Check-in rejected at preflight per AC-07b and AC-07e; no GPS step; no Present attendance; FR-07 enrollment guard enforced before gps_capture

cases.title: CheckInService.submit atomically marks Present and consumes QrToken in PostgreSQL transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row with enrollment and Pending attendance_records row for studentId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid for sessionId (tokenId matches QR payload)
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService and QrTokenRepository with serializable isolation
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayload, studentId) with in-radius coordinates
Query attendance_records for sessionId and studentId
Query qr_tokens for tokenId
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success
cases.expected: Single transaction per domain model §5.2: attendance transitions to Present with checkedInAt set; qr_token status Consumed; CheckInAttempt logged per FR-07 check-in pipeline

cases.title: Successful mobile check-in transitions Attendance Pending to Present and QrToken Valid to Consumed
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
CheckInService.submit callable with TestClock fixed within token TTL and attendance window
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending and QrToken Valid from database
Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId from QR payload and in-radius locationPayload
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with non-null checkedInAt
Query qr_tokens and assert afterState Consumed
Verify state machine guards per 07-state-machines.md SM-02 and SM-03
cases.expected: beforeState Pending/Valid; afterState Present/Consumed; FR-07 successful check-in updates attendance status to Present on success

cases.title: POST /check-in returns 200 with Success outcome and attendance DTO for valid mobile submission
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
tokenId extracted from qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight already returned 200 outcome Valid
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains outcome Success, message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response body attendance object contains status Present and checkedInAt ISO 8601 UTC string
Assert no errorCode field present on success envelope per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract per API design §6.3; structured success response for mobile web client after QR token submission

cases.title: POST /check-in for not-enrolled student returns 403 NotEnrolled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Student session for user not enrolled in target session
Valid unexpired QrToken from scanned QR deep link
In-radius coordinates supplied in request body
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using non-enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert response body contains localized Vietnamese enrollment message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
Verify CheckInAttempt row inserted with outcome NotEnrolled
cases.expected: HTTP 403 NotEnrolled per API design §6.3; canonical failure envelope; no Present attendance per FR-07 failure path

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with 403 Forbidden (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is available
Active session with valid QrToken exists
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify no attendance record for instructor userId transitions to Present
cases.expected: Only Student role holds checkin:submit; FR-07 check-in and preflight restricted to Student actor; Instructor attempt denied with HTTP 403

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /check-in and preflight with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Active session with valid QrToken and enrolled student context exists
Admin role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2 matrix
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using TrainingOfficeAdmin session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert no Present attendance created for admin userId
cases.expected: checkin:submit restricted to Student role per FR-07 actor specification; admin cannot preflight or submit check-in via student endpoint

cases.title: Not-enrolled student preflight boundary: 403 NotEnrolled while enrolled student preflight passes
preconditions: Two students: Student A enrolled in session, Student B authenticated but not enrolled
Same Active session with separate Valid QrToken fixtures
Both students have in-radius GPS coordinates for subsequent submit
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight as Student A and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
POST /api/v1/check-in as Student A with tokenId and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success (control: enrolled path works)
Issue fresh Valid token for second assertion
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:newTokenId/preflight as Student B and assert HTTP 403 with outcome NotEnrolled
Query attendance for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
cases.expected: Enrollment boundary enforced at preflight per validation-rules §3.6a step 5; enrolled preflight passes, non-enrolled rejected without Present

cases.title: Flow A step 4: Enrolled student preflight pass then POST /check-in after QR poll
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active, QR token polled via GET /sessions/:id/qr/current
Authenticated enrolled Student session established (login with returnUrl preserving deep link)
Student coordinates within session radius
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid with session summary
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert present count incremented by 1
Verify tokenId status Consumed in database
cases.expected: Flow A happy-path mobile check-in step succeeds per testing-plan §6 Flow A; FR-07 preflight gate then submit validated end-to-end in workshop lifecycle

cases.title: CheckInService persists CheckInAttempt row with Success outcome on every successful submission
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
check_in_attempts table accessible for inspection
steps: Count check_in_attempts rows for sessionId and studentId before submit
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius payload
Query newest check_in_attempts row for sessionId and studentId
Assert outcome Success, studentId matches, tokenId matches, submittedAt populated
Assert raw latitude/longitude not persisted in attendance_records per NFR-12
cases.expected: Every check-in attempt logged per checkin-qr module §2.4; Success outcome recorded alongside Present attendance per FR-07 outputs

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET preflight and POST /check-in return 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header present
Active session with valid QrToken and tokenId from QR payload available
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with no auth credentials and assert HTTP status 401 outcome Unauthenticated
POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response outcome Unauthenticated and errorCode Unauthenticated
Verify no attendance record transitions to Present for any student
cases.expected: FR-07 requires authenticated student session; unauthenticated preflight and submit return 401 Unauthenticated per BR-06

cases.title: Mobile web QR scan check-in: getUserMedia scan → preflight → GPS → Vietnamese success
preconditions: Authenticated Student logged in on mobile viewport 375×812
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production-default build)
Active session with instructor QR displayed; valid qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Browser geolocation mocked or granted with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
Device camera permission granted for QR scanner component
steps: Student opens /check-in on mobile viewport and taps Quét mã QR or uses camera scanner
Assert navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia invoked with facingMode environment (no synthetic camera layer when sim off)
Scan QR code encoding wecheck://check-in deep link and verify client extracts tokenId from payload
Verify validating_token inline spinner on scan step while GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight in flight
After preflight 200 outcome Valid, verify GpsCaptureStep mounts with session summary (class, subject, room) in header
Grant location permission via navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition and wait for coordinates capture
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Verify success panel displays Điểm danh thành công with Present status and checked-in timestamp in vi-VN locale
cases.expected: FR-07 mobile web QR scan flow: real getUserMedia and geolocation when sim off; preflight gate per BR-15 before GPS; Vietnamese UI copy; token submitted with authenticated identity

cases.title: Mobile check-in confirmation UI appears within 2 seconds of submit tap
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session and valid unexpired token deep-linked to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Preflight already passed; GpsCaptureStep in ready substate with coordinates captured
Network throttling disabled (normal network profile)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on mobile viewport and wait for preflight pass and GPS ready
Record timestamp T0 immediately before clicking Xác nhận điểm danh submit button
Click submit after GPS coordinates captured
Wait for success confirmation element (Điểm danh thành công or Present badge)
Record timestamp T1 when success UI visible
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 2000 ms
cases.expected: User-visible confirmation within 2 s under normal network per FR-07 and NFR-04; server-authoritative outcome reflected in UI

cases.title: iOS 15+ Safari mobile check-in: QR scan, preflight, and GPS submit succeeds without native app
preconditions: Playwright emulates iPhone 12+ with iOS 15+ Safari user-agent
Authenticated enrolled Student session on mobile viewport
Active session with valid check-in deep link wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Geolocation mocked with in-radius coordinates
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on iOS Safari emulation
Verify page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px width
Wait for preflight pass and GpsCaptureStep with session summary visible
Grant geolocation permission via browser context override
Submit check-in and verify success panel Điểm danh thành công
Verify no app store or native app install prompt appears
cases.expected: FR-07 platform target iOS 15+ Safari supported; mobile web only per MVP scope §7.3; no native app install required

cases.title: Android 10+ Chrome mobile check-in: QR deep link, preflight, and GPS submit succeeds
preconditions: Playwright emulates Android mid-range device with Chrome user-agent (Android 10+)
Authenticated enrolled Student session on mobile viewport 360×640
Active session with valid token deep link
Geolocation mocked with in-radius coordinates and spoofMetadata.platform android
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on Android Chrome emulation
Verify all UI labels and messages render in Vietnamese (vi-VN)
Wait for preflight pass then grant geolocation permission and submit check-in
Verify success confirmation Điểm danh thành công with Present status
Verify page usable without native Android app
cases.expected: FR-07 platform target Android 10+ Chrome supported per functional requirements traceability; mobile web check-in without native app

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows NotEnrolled outcome at preflight without mounting GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated Student B not enrolled in target session on mobile viewport 375px width
Valid check-in deep link with tokenId and sessionId for Active session
steps: Student B opens /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns NotEnrolled
Verify error panel displays localized message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
Verify GpsCaptureStep does not mount (no Vị trí đã sẵn sàng or GPS permission prompt)
Verify no success confirmation or Present badge shown
cases.expected: Non-enrolled student sees preflight rejection in mobile web UI per AC-07b and AC-07e; FR-07 failure surfaced with vi-VN copy before gps_capture

cases.title: QR deep link opens login redirect then preflight pass returns to check-in GPS step
preconditions: Unauthenticated student opens scanned QR deep link on mobile browser
Active session with valid token in QR payload wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Student account exists with valid credentials and is enrolled in session
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId without session cookie on mobile viewport
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in query params
Complete login with valid student credentials
Verify redirect back to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with session established
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight runs and passes; scan UI skipped but preflight not skipped per BR-15
Complete GPS capture and submit; verify Điểm danh thành công success confirmation
cases.expected: Mobile QR scan flow integrates auth gate per BR-06; preflight runs after login before GPS per BR-15; student completes FR-07 check-in without re-scanning QR

cases.title: Check-in page UI copy is Vietnamese (vi-VN) for labels, buttons, and outcome messages
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport
Active session with valid token deep link to /check-in page
Application locale set to vi-VN default
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify page title, preflight validating spinner text, GPS prompt text, and submit button use Vietnamese copy (e.g. Xác nhận điểm danh)
Submit successful check-in and verify success message Điểm danh thành công
Verify no English-only user-facing strings on primary check-in flow controls
cases.expected: FR-07 specifies UI copy is Vietnamese (vi-VN); all primary check-in flow strings localized per NFR-17

cases.title: Client tokenId from qrPayload deep link resolves to Valid QrToken row for CheckInService.submit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and Valid qr_tokens row
qrPayload string wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId matches database tokenId
Enrolled studentId with Pending attendance
steps: Parse tokenId from qrPayload deep link format per API design §6.1
Invoke CheckInService.submit(parsedTokenId, locationPayload, studentId)
Assert CheckInResult outcome Success
Query qr_tokens where id equals parsedTokenId and assert status Consumed
cases.expected: FR-07 client extracts token from QR payload; parsed tokenId binds to one-time-use session token consumed on successful check-in

cases.title: PreflightService read-only chain validates token Valid, session Active, and enrollment without writes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, Valid qr_tokens row, and enrolled studentId
PreflightService wired to QrTokenRepository, SessionRepository, and EnrollmentRepository
beforeState: qr_token status Valid, attendance status Pending, no check_in_attempts row for this preflight call
steps: Invoke PreflightService.validate(tokenId, studentId) against enrolled student
Assert result outcome Valid with session summary (classCode, subjectCode, roomName, status Active)
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status remains Valid (not Consumed)
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Verify no INSERT or UPDATE executed during preflight (read-only per validation-rules §3.6a)
cases.expected: Preflight read-only chain per FR-07 and BR-15: token exists Valid, parent session Active, student enrolled; no side effects before POST /check-in

cases.title: TS-21a: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 Valid with session summary
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active sessionId with Valid unexpired QrToken for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 room Phòng A201
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionId using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body outcome Valid, tokenId, and sessionId match request
Assert response body session object contains classCode HESD-01, subjectCode SWE-101, roomName Phòng A201, status Active
cases.expected: HTTP 200 preflight pass contract per API design §6.2; client may advance to gps_capture with session context per AC-07c

cases.title: TS-21b: GET preflight for expired token returns 403 ExpiredQr envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
QrToken fixture with status Expired or TestClock at T + 31 seconds after token issuedAt
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert Vietnamese message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Verify qr_tokens row status unchanged (read-only preflight did not consume token)
cases.expected: HTTP 403 ExpiredQr preflight failure per API design §6.2 and AC-07d; client must not mount GpsCaptureStep

cases.title: GET preflight for non-enrolled student returns 403 NotEnrolled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Student B session for user not enrolled in target session class-subject
Active session with Valid unexpired QrToken
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert Vietnamese message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
cases.expected: HTTP 403 NotEnrolled preflight contract per API design §6.2 and AC-07e; enrollment guard before GPS step

cases.title: TS-21c: GET preflight with mismatched sessionId query returns 403 SessionMismatch
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Valid QrToken bound to sessionId A
Different sessionId B supplied as query param (deep-link session mismatch)
steps: Send GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionIdB where tokenId belongs to sessionId A
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome SessionMismatch and errorCode SessionMismatch
Verify no attendance or token status mutation occurred
cases.expected: SessionMismatch preflight rejection per validation-rules §3.6a step 2 and AC-07f; GPS step never mounts

cases.title: QrScannerView invokes getUserMedia and geolocation APIs when device simulation flag off
preconditions: Web build with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport at /check-in/scan
Instrument page to record navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia and navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition calls
URL query params gpsSim and cameraSim present but must be ignored per NFR-24
steps: Open /check-in/scan and trigger QR scanner mount
Assert getUserMedia called with video constraints facingMode environment; synthetic camera layer not used
Complete scan and preflight pass to mount GpsCaptureStep
Assert navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition invoked (not URL gpsSim override)
Verify gpsSim query param did not bypass real geolocation API
cases.expected: Production-default device API fidelity per FR-07 and NFR-24: real getUserMedia for scan and geolocation for GPS when simulation flag off

cases.title: GpsCaptureStep ready substate hides spinner and enables submit per ui-states §4.2
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Valid token deep link; preflight passed; GpsCaptureStep mounted
Geolocation resolves in-radius coordinates (gpsState transitions to ready)
steps: Wait for GpsCaptureStep substate ready after coordinates acquired
Assert no spinner visible in GPS step region
Assert check icon and text Vị trí đã sẵn sàng displayed
Assert submit region aria-busy is false
Assert Xác nhận điểm danh button enabled immediately
Verify sessionGate checking in parallel does not restore spinner once ready
cases.expected: GpsCaptureStep ready UX per ui-states §4.2 and event-specific-components §2.2: spinner hidden, submit enabled; preflight parallel gate must not regress UI to spinner

cases.title: Preflight pass advances CheckInFlow to GPS step with session summary visible
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session with valid token deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
steps: Navigate to check-in deep link and observe validating_token inline spinner on scan step
Wait for GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight to return 200 outcome Valid
Verify GpsCaptureStep mounts (data-testid or GPS prompt visible)
Verify GPS step header displays class code, subject code, and room name from preflight session summary
Verify QrScannerView is no longer active
cases.expected: AC-07c satisfied: preflight 200 advances scan → gps_capture with session context per FR-07 and BR-15

cases.title: Preflight failure keeps user on scan step; GpsCaptureStep never mounts
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Expired or unknown tokenId in deep link /check-in?token=:expiredTokenId&session=:sessionId
steps: Navigate to check-in deep link with expired token
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight returns ExpiredQr or TokenNotFound
Verify user remains on scan step or ExpiredQr outcome panel shown inline
Assert GpsCaptureStep not present in DOM (no GPS permission prompt, no Vị trí đã sẵn sàng)
Verify Cần bật GPS badge and submit controls for GPS step absent
cases.expected: AC-07d satisfied: preflight failure per BR-15 prevents gps_capture; student prompted to scan fresh QR
